name: pushfundz-user-flow-test
description: Comprehensive user flow test suite for PushFundz crypto lending platform

scripts.start:backend: cd crypto-lending-backend && poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd crypto-lending-frontend && npm install && cd ../backend/microservices/games-service && npm install
